log: ══ ROUND 1 ══
--- Cult Fanatic --- HP: 33/33 | AC: 13

→ melee_spell attack: [d20:13+3=16 vs AC 14] HIT! 8casting_mod force damage. Air Genasi — Winged Striker HP: NaN/67

→ Air Genasi — Winged Striker: DEX save [d20:20+6=26 vs DC 11] SUCCESS. No effect.
══ ROUND 1 ══
--- Air Genasi — Winged Striker --- HP: 67/67 | AC: 14
REASONING: ROUND 1: 5 enemies. Opening with Hypnotic Pattern.
ACTION: Cast Hypnotic Pattern (Level 3 slot, 2 remaining). DC 16 WIS save. 30ft cube.
→ Cult Fanatic: WIS save [d20(ADV):19+1=20 vs DC 16] SUCCESS. Resists. (had advantage)
→ Cult Fanatic: WIS save [d20(ADV):19+1=20 vs DC 16] SUCCESS. Resists. (had advantage)
→ Cult Fanatic: WIS save [d20(ADV):19+1=20 vs DC 16] SUCCESS. Resists. (had advantage)
→ Cult Fanatic: WIS save [d20(ADV):17+1=18 vs DC 16] SUCCESS. Resists. (had advantage)
→ Mage: WIS save [d20:4+4=8 vs DC 16] FAIL!
→ 1/5 targets affected.
--- Cult Fanatic --- HP: 33/33 | AC: 13
REASONING: Moving to shake Mage awake from charm.
MOVEMENT: Moves toward Mage.
ACTION: Shakes Mage awake! Charmed + Incapacitated removed.
